# Frontend Vendor References

These files are reference-only upstream mirrors. They are not exported as the
`frontend-craft` v1 skill surface.

Active exported frontend skills live in:

- `packs/core/skills/optional/frontend-craft/sane-frontend-craft.md`
- `packs/core/skills/optional/frontend-craft/sane-frontend-visual-assets.md`
- `packs/core/skills/optional/frontend-craft/sane-frontend-review.md`

`packs/core/manifest.json` records upstream provenance. Keep these mirrors out
of install/export paths unless a future capability audit explicitly promotes a
vendor asset.
